nasb.text: and they are seven kings; five have fallen, one is, the other has not yet come; and when he comes, he must remain a little while.

esv.text: they are also seven kings, five of whom have fallen, one is, the other has not yet come, and when he does come he must remain only a little while.

cnv.text: 也就是七位王：五位已經倒了，一位還在，另一位還沒有來到；他來的時候，必須存留一會兒。

ccb.text: 其中五个已经衰亡，一个还在，另外一个还未来到，他来后只能短暂存留。

csbs.text: 五个已经倒了，一个还在，另一个还没有到来；他来的时候，必须存留片刻。
